name: public_safety_classroom_monitoring_marrowbridge_ind_col
premise: A school threat assessment model surfaced a student’s mental-health crisis notes to patrol without counselor review. In Public Safety, the situation tagged internally around public safety classroom monitoring marrowbridge ind col has converged with local pressure in the Marrowbridge corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Two executives have pre-committed to opposite remedies in side channels; whichever memo lands first will box everyone in. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. No option cleanly satisfies both individual and collective; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Harper Haddad
agents.identity: I am Harper Haddad, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Public Safety. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat collective as disposable collateral every time individual spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Amina Berg
agents.identity: I am Amina Berg, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Public Safety. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so individual cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes collective in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on collective.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on collective for immediate traction on individual.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Harper Haddad must choose under individual versus collective. What does Harper Haddad do?
